items.title: Tech billionaires cashed out $16 billion in 2025 as stocks soared
items.description: Jeff Bezos led the way. The Amazon founder sold 25 million shares for $5.7 billion in June and July, right around the time he was getting hitched to Lauren Sanchez in Venice.

items.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Says People Worth $500 Billion 'Scrambled And Left California' Over Billionaire Tax, Warns That It Will Deepen Budget Deficit
items.description: Venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya says a proposed California billionaire tax is already driving ultra-wealthy residents out of the state, a move he warns could worsen the budget deficit rather than fix it. Chamath Says $500 Billion Wealth Exit Over Proposed Billionaire Tax On Thursday, Palihapitiya took to X that people he knows with a combined net worth of about $500 billion moved to leave California permanently after the state floated a proposed "billionaire tax," which he described as a

items.title: Best Stock to Buy Right Now: Amazon vs. Costco
items.description: These large-cap companies have significantly outperformed the market in the past decade.

items.title: History of Costco: Company timeline and facts
items.description: Costco is a retailer that sells goods at wholesale prices. It pioneered the membership warehouse club model 50 years ago. Costco sells a wide variety of goods ranging from produce and other grocery items to clothes, TV sets, and even luxury items such as gold bars and Rolex watches that can sell ...
